plan_deviation: NONE expected. Master plan §'Phase 7 — Search (Pagefind)' followed verbatim. Two minor spec-drift notes (NOT deviations): (1) Pagefind 1.5.2 output naming uses index/+fragment/ subdirs + *.pf_meta, not *.pf_index per master plan Step 1; (2) 4 redirect pages 'no <html> element' warnings = pre-existing C-P7-6 expected behavior.

findings.F-8.1-1_pagefind_artifacts_present: PASS — 17 artifacts in dist/pagefind/ including pagefind.js + pagefind-ui.js + pagefind-component-ui.js + index/ + fragment/ + pagefind-entry.json + 3 *.pf_meta + wasm.{en,unknown}.pagefind
findings.F-8.1-2_languages_indexed: PASS — 3 langs (zh, en, ja) matches Phase 7 close baseline
findings.F-8.1-3_pages_indexed: PASS — 27 pages indexed matches Phase 7 close 27 content pages baseline
findings.F-8.1-5_redirect_pages_html_warnings: ACCEPTED — 4 pages without <html> matches C-P7-6 (correct: redirect pages should not be indexed)
findings.F-8.1-6_master_plan_pf_index_naming_drif: INFO — Pagefind 1.5.2 uses index/ + fragment/ subdirs + *.pf_meta, not *.pf_index per master plan Step 1 line 2496. Functionally equivalent. Documented in PLAN.md §'Plan deviation flag'.

spec_adjustments: Adj-1: dynamic import indirected via const pagefindUrl + .catch() — Vite import-analysis static check fails on adjacent literal even with /* @vite-ignore */; .catch silences jsdom + dev-server unhandled rejection

Adj-2: e2e exercises ⌘K hint button click (whose inline onclick dispatches synthetic keydown on document) instead of raw page.keyboard.press('Meta+k') — keypress without focused target wasn't reaching React document listener in headless chromium; layered coverage retained (vitest covers raw-keydown path)
Adj-3: aria-label='Search docs' added to input for parity with CompareFilter pattern

blockers_flagged.B-1_playwright_webserver_uses_dev_not_pr: INFORMATIONAL — playwright.config.ts uses `npm run dev` as webServer.command; search.spec.ts requires `npm run build && npm run preview` lane (Pagefind index built only on build). Test file header documents manual lane. Recommend C-P8-1 carryover Phase 9 polish: switch playwright webServer to build+preview (~2-3s slowdown but CI-green). Per task brief: STOPPED + reported instead of modifying config.
blockers_flagged.B-2_astro_island_missing_await_children_: RESOLVED during execution — correct: SearchOverlay SSRs as null (closed state), no children to await.
